examples: But that spray contained no boric acid.
Patient: : Well, then. Give me some boric acid.
Boric acid is generally safe for human beings and other mammals.
Eating pho probably poses a more serious threat, since some unscrupulous merchants try to preserve perishable noodles with formaldehyde or boric acid.
This seems pretty unlikely as long as they maintain enough boric acid concentration in the water that they are pouring on the fuel (into the vessels).
